description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of flat and gently sloped roofs, surrounded by lush landscaping and privacy fencing. The exterior is clad in light tan and brown materials, likely wood or composite siding, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a spacious backyard with a pool, patio, and multiple outdoor seating areas, as well as a detached garage and a small gazebo or outbuilding. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged with mature trees, shrubs, and manicured lawns, creating a private and inviting atmosphere. The house appears to have two stories in one section, with the rest being single-story, and the main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch. The overall layout is open and contemporary, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces seamlessly.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring a pool, patio, and detached garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade, privacy fencing, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entryway, front yard, and a glimpse of the patio and gazebo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the two-story section, large windows, and backyard greenery.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio area, and detached garage, with visible outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch entry with wide steps, modern door, and minimal decorative elements
